info.name: GoTyolo - Admin API
info.description: Phase 6 Admin APIs: trip metrics and at-risk trips. Base URL: http://localhost:5001 (admin routes are under /admin, not /api). Set tripId from GET /api/trips or from a trip response.

request.description: GET /admin/trips/:tripId/metrics – Returns occupancy_percent, total_seats, booked_seats, available_seats, booking_summary (confirmed, pending_payment, cancelled, expired), financial (gross_revenue, refunds_issued, net_revenue). Set tripId to a valid trip UUID (e.g. from Get All Trips). 200 with metrics or 404 if trip not found.

GET /admin/trips/at-risk – Returns trips where departure is within 7 days AND occupancy < 50%. Response: { at_risk_trips: [ { trip_id, title, departure_date, occupancy_percent, reason } ] }. 200 always; array is empty if no trips match. Seed trips with start_date in the next 7 days and low bookings to see non-empty results.
